title: SaltyMod Expanded
description: A fork/expansion of the original SaltyMod made by liahim85. Started as a project to add compatibility with Et Futurum Requiem and became a full-blown expansion
body:
![SaltyMod Expanded Title Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c11d1ed6e3c3e43d3834e8e79c4805a013c75e1.png)

Hey there, I'm DarkBum and today I'm introducing to you a little expansion I made for the [*SaltyMod*](https://beta.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/saltymod), originally created by the user [*liahim85*](https://www.curseforge.com/members/liahim85/projects) who has given me permission to create this expansion.

A while ago I was on the lookout for a mod that expands upon the (not so) numerous Food Items in 1.7.10, without creating the feature bloat of larger mods like Pam's HarvestCraft, and I stumbled upon this lovely mod. **Please do check it out**, even though it is not needed for this expansion to work. Credit where credit is due!

Since 2018, the 1.7.10 modding community has been very active, with huge backporting mods like [*Et Futurum Requiem*](https://modrinth.com/mod/etfuturum) and [*Netherlicious*](https://beta.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/netherlicious) being created, so in a fashion staying true to Liahim's mod, I wanted to expand upon it.

Big thanks to [*jss2a98aj*](https://github.com/jss2a98aj), [*Roadhog360*](https://github.com/Roadhog360), [*DelirusCrux*](https://github.com/DelirusCrux) and [*AstroTibs*](https://gitgud.io/AstroTibs) and everyone else on the Legacy Modding Discord Server for helping me with this mod! 💙

If you have any questions (especially regarding the "ShouldBeVanilla" tag in multiple of the features) or ideas or if you want to notify me of bugs, please visit the [*Legacy Modding Discord Server*](https://discord.gg/9vnDAM5kXY) and find me there! :)


### Features:
#### Inherited by the original SaltyMod:
More information on the [*original mod page*](https://beta.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/saltymod)

##### Blocks:
- Salt Ore
- Salt Crystal
- Salt Lake Bottom
- Saline Soil
- Mineral Mud
- Salt Blocks
- Salt Slabs
- Salt Stairs
- Salt Lamp
- Evaporator

##### Items:
- Mineral Mud
- Baking Soda
- Powdered Milk
- Salt
- Pinch of Salt
- Tough Jelly
- Saltwort
- Fuzzy Drink
- Salted Meats
- Salted Baked Potato
- Salted Fishes
- Cured Meat
- Salted Bread
- Soft-boiled Egg
- Salted Mushroom Stew
- Salted Mushroom Stew
- Pumpkin Porridge
- (Salted) Stewed Vegetables
-(Salty) Potato with Mushroom
- (Salted) Fish Soups
- (Salted) Dandelion Salad
- (Salted) Wheat Sprouts
- Saltwort Salad
- Meats with Saltwort
- Fruit Salad
- Grated Carrot
- Numerous Pies
- Fermented Saltwort
- Fermented Mushroom/Fern
- Muffin

##### Other Features:
- Dried Salt Lakes
- Underground Salt Farms

#### Backport Update:
This update backports food items that were added in Minecraft versions after 1.7.10, using Et Futurum Requiem as reference for items like Mutton, Beetroot and Sweet Berries

##### Items:
- Salted Cooked Mutton
- Salted Cooked Rabbit
- Salted Beetroot
- Salted Rabbit Stew
- Salted Beetroot Soup
- Cooked Mutton with Saltwort

#### Expansion Update:
This update expanded upon the food items, creating compatibility for other mods, like Netherlicious or my own private "ShouldBeVanilla" mod which hasn't been published (yet).

##### Items:
- Debug Foods (For testing purposes only)
- Salted Strider Steak [Netherlicious]
- Salted Cooked Haunch [ShouldBeVanilla]
- Salted Cooked Tropical Fish [ShouldBeVanilla]
- Salted Calamari [ShouldBeVanilla]
- Salted Pumpkin Porridge
- (Salted) Cactus Soup
- (Salted) Tropical Fish Soup
- Cooked Haunch with Saltwort [ShouldBeVanilla]
- Tropical Fish Pie
- Calamari Pie [ShouldBeVanilla]
- Shepherd's Pie
- Pickled Calamari [ShouldBeVanilla]
- Pickled Onion

#### Sweetness Update!:
This update opens up a whole new branch of spicing up food: Sugar, Honey & Chocolate! For now, recipes that use honey will use the HarvestCraft honeycombs, but if you want other mods referenced, just write a discord message and I might add it :)
Of course the Sweetness Update! relies heavily on some mod that adds honey. As soon as Et Futurum Requiem adds the Buzzy Bees content, that will also be integrated.

##### Items:
- Pinch of Sugar
- Sugared Fruit Salad
- Sugared Grated Carrot
- (Sugared) Melon Soup
- Honey Glazed Porkchop with Saltwort
- Honey Glazed Sweet Berries [Et Futurum Requiem]
- Honey Glazed Apple
- Honey Glazed Porkchop
- Chocolate Laced Sweet Berries [Et Futurum Requiem]
- Chocolate Bar
- Chocolate Pie
- Sweet Berry Pie [Et Futurum Requiem]

#### Nature Update [WIP]:
This update adds and will add more content to the world generation and world as a whole, and it also is inspired somewhat by the 1.19 Wild Update

##### Blocks:
- Deepslate Salt Ore
- Wet Mud Bricks
- Mud Bricks

#### The Everything Update:
This update has indeed changed everything, to the point that this version is not compatible with earlier versions.

##### Blocks:
- Marsh Reeds Bale
- Salt-Crusted Oak Log
- Fish Farm
- (Boreal) Bee Nest
- (Stripped) Bee Burrow
- Apiary
- Stove
- Press
- Mill
- Cooking Pot
- Clay Oven
- Storage Crate
- Storage Barrel
- Storage Sack
- Salt Flowers
- Marsh Reeds

##### Items:
- Fish Bait
- Bee Larva
- Bees
- Waxcomb
- Honeycomb
- Frozen Honey
- Royal Jelly
- Sheep Horn
- Dough
- Onion
- Golden Saltwort
- Golden Potato
- Golden Sweetberries
- (Salted) Cooked Tropical Fish
- (Salted) (Cooked) Tailor
- Egg Bowl
- (Salted) Fungus Stew
- (Salted) Chicken Soup
- (Salted) Beef Stew
- (Salted) Bone Marrow Soup
- (Salted) Golden Vegetables
- Golden Saltwort Salad
- Sugared Apple
- Sugared Melon
- Sugared Sweetberries
- (Sugared) Golden Fruit Salad
- Sweetberry Cookie
- Chorus Cookie
- Birthday Pie
- Tailor Pie
- Fermented Marsh Reeds
- Pickled Beetroot
- Apple Preserves
- Melon Preserves
- Sweetberry Preserves
- Salt Pickaxe
- Salt Shard

##### Other Features:
- Salt Marsh
- Brickmaker Camps
- Horned Sheep
- Well Fed, Swarmed! and Inspired Potion Effects
- New Dispenser functionality for filling and emptying Water Bottles
- New Evaporator GUI
